info.name: Tally Prime - Purchases API
info.description: Complete API collection for fetching Purchase vouchers from Tally Prime via ODBC/XML

request.description: Fetch list of all companies to verify the exact company name

body.raw:
<ENVELOPE>
  <HEADER>
    <VERSION>1</VERSION>
    <TALLYREQUEST>Export</TALLYREQUEST>
    <TYPE>Collection</TYPE>
    <ID>AllVouchers</ID>
  </HEADER>
  <BODY>
    <DESC>
      <STATICVARIABLES>
        <SVCURRENTCOMPANY>M/S. SAHOO SANITARY (2025-26)</SVCURRENTCOMPANY>
        <SVFROMDATE TYPE="Date">20250401</SVFROMDATE>
        <SVTODATE TYPE="Date">20251019</SVTODATE>
      </STATICVARIABLES>
      <TDL>
        <TDLMESSAGE>
          <COLLECTION NAME="AllVouchers">
            <TYPE>Voucher</TYPE>
            <FETCH>VOUCHERTYPENAME, VOUCHERNUMBER, DATE, PARTYLEDGERNAME, AMOUNT</FETCH>
          </COLLECTION>
        </TDLMESSAGE>
      </TDL>
    </DESC>
  </BODY>
</ENVELOPE>

request.description: Test query to fetch ALL vouchers without any filter - use this to see what voucher types exist in your company

body.raw:
<ENVELOPE>
  <HEADER>
    <VERSION>1</VERSION>
    <TALLYREQUEST>Export</TALLYREQUEST>
    <TYPE>Collection</TYPE>
    <ID>PurchaseVouchers</ID>
  </HEADER>
  <BODY>
    <DESC>
      <STATICVARIABLES>
        <SVCURRENTCOMPANY>M/S. SAHOO SANITARY (2025-26)</SVCURRENTCOMPANY>
        <SVFROMDATE TYPE="Date">20250401</SVFROMDATE>
        <SVTODATE TYPE="Date">20251019</SVTODATE>
      </STATICVARIABLES>
      <TDL>
        <TDLMESSAGE>
          <COLLECTION NAME="MyPurchaseVouchers">
            <TYPE>Voucher</TYPE>
            <FETCH>DATE, VOUCHERNUMBER, PARTYLEDGERNAME, VOUCHERTYPENAME, AMOUNT, GUID, REFERENCE, NARRATION</FETCH>
            <FILTER>PurchaseFilter</FILTER>
          </COLLECTION>
          <SYSTEM TYPE="Formulae" NAME="PurchaseFilter">$$IsPurchase:$VOUCHERTYPENAME</SYSTEM>
        </TDLMESSAGE>
      </TDL>
    </DESC>
  </BODY>
</ENVELOPE>

request.description: Fetch all Purchase vouchers for the current month from Tally Prime

body.raw:
<ENVELOPE>
  <HEADER>
    <VERSION>1</VERSION>
    <TALLYREQUEST>EXPORT</TALLYREQUEST>
    <TYPE>COLLECTION</TYPE>
    <ID>Purchase Vouchers</ID>
  </HEADER>
  <BODY>
    <DESC>
      <STATICVARIABLES>
        <SVCURRENTCOMPANY>M/S. SAHOO SANITARY (2025-26)</SVCURRENTCOMPANY>
        <SVFROMDATE TYPE="DATE">20250401</SVFROMDATE>
        <SVTODATE TYPE="DATE">20251019</SVTODATE>
        <SVEXPORTFORMAT>$$SysName:XML</SVEXPORTFORMAT>
      </STATICVARIABLES>
      <TDL>
        <TDLMESSAGE>
          <COLLECTION NAME="Purchase Vouchers" ISMODIFY="No" ISFIXED="No" ISINITIALIZE="Yes" ISOPTION="No" ISINTERNAL="No">
            <TYPE>Voucher</TYPE>
            <FETCH>DATE, VOUCHERNUMBER, PARTYLEDGERNAME, AMOUNT, VOUCHERTYPENAME, GUID, VCHTYPE, REFERENCE, NARRATION</FETCH>
            <FILTER>PurchaseVouchersOnly</FILTER>
          </COLLECTION>
          <SYSTEM TYPE="Formulae" NAME="PurchaseVouchersOnly">$$IsPurchase:$VOUCHERTYPE</SYSTEM>
        </TDLMESSAGE>
      </TDL>
    </DESC>
  </BODY>
</ENVELOPE>

request.description: Fetch Purchase vouchers for a custom date range (Financial Year 2025-26)

item.name: Get Purchase Vouchers - Current Financial Year

body.raw:
<ENVELOPE>
  <HEADER>
    <VERSION>1</VERSION>
    <TALLYREQUEST>EXPORT</TALLYREQUEST>
    <TYPE>COLLECTION</TYPE>
    <ID>Purchase Vouchers</ID>
  </HEADER>
  <BODY>
    <DESC>
      <STATICVARIABLES>
        <SVCURRENTCOMPANY>M/S. SAHOO SANITARY (2025-26)</SVCURRENTCOMPANY>
        <SVFROMDATE TYPE="DATE">20250401</SVFROMDATE>
        <SVTODATE TYPE="DATE">20260331</SVTODATE>
        <SVEXPORTFORMAT>$$SysName:XML</SVEXPORTFORMAT>
      </STATICVARIABLES>
      <TDL>
        <TDLMESSAGE>
          <COLLECTION NAME="Purchase Vouchers" ISMODIFY="No" ISFIXED="No" ISINITIALIZE="Yes" ISOPTION="No" ISINTERNAL="No">
            <TYPE>Voucher</TYPE>
            <FETCH>DATE, VOUCHERNUMBER, PARTYLEDGERNAME, AMOUNT, VOUCHERTYPENAME, GUID, VCHTYPE, REFERENCE, NARRATION</FETCH>
            <FILTER>PurchaseVouchersOnly</FILTER>
          </COLLECTION>
          <SYSTEM TYPE="Formulae" NAME="PurchaseVouchersOnly">$$IsPurchase:$VOUCHERTYPE</SYSTEM>
        </TDLMESSAGE>
      </TDL>
    </DESC>
  </BODY>
</ENVELOPE>

request.description: Fetch all Purchase vouchers for current financial year (April 2025 - March 2026)

item.name: Get Purchase Voucher Details by GUID

request.description: Fetch complete details of a specific Purchase voucher using its GUID. Includes inventory items, GST breakdown, and ledger entries.

item.name: Get Purchase Vouchers with Inventory Details

body.raw:
<ENVELOPE>
  <HEADER>
    <VERSION>1</VERSION>
    <TALLYREQUEST>EXPORT</TALLYREQUEST>
    <TYPE>COLLECTION</TYPE>
    <ID>Purchase Vouchers with Items</ID>
  </HEADER>
  <BODY>
    <DESC>
      <STATICVARIABLES>
        <SVCURRENTCOMPANY>M/S. SAHOO SANITARY (2025-26)</SVCURRENTCOMPANY>
        <SVFROMDATE TYPE="DATE">20250401</SVFROMDATE>
        <SVTODATE TYPE="DATE">20251019</SVTODATE>
        <SVEXPORTFORMAT>$$SysName:XML</SVEXPORTFORMAT>
      </STATICVARIABLES>
      <TDL>
        <TDLMESSAGE>
          <COLLECTION NAME="Purchase Vouchers with Items" ISMODIFY="No" ISFIXED="No" ISINITIALIZE="Yes">
            <TYPE>Voucher</TYPE>
            <FETCH>DATE, VOUCHERNUMBER, PARTYLEDGERNAME, AMOUNT, GUID, VCHTYPE</FETCH>
            <FETCH>ALLINVENTORYENTRIES.LIST : STOCKITEMNAME, ACTUALQTY, BILLEDQTY, RATE, AMOUNT</FETCH>
            <FILTER>PurchaseVouchersOnly</FILTER>
          </COLLECTION>
          <SYSTEM TYPE="Formulae" NAME="PurchaseVouchersOnly">$$IsPurchase:$VOUCHERTYPE</SYSTEM>
        </TDLMESSAGE>
      </TDL>
    </DESC>
  </BODY>
</ENVELOPE>

request.description: Fetch Purchase vouchers with inventory/stock item details including quantities and rates

body.raw:
<ENVELOPE>
  <HEADER>
    <TALLYREQUEST>EXPORT</TALLYREQUEST>
    <TYPE>Collection</TYPE>
    <ID>Voucher Register</ID>
  </HEADER>
  <BODY>
    <DESC>
      <STATICVARIABLES>
        <SVEXPORTFORMAT>$$SysName:XML</SVEXPORTFORMAT>
        <SVFROMDATE TYPE="Date">20250401</SVFROMDATE>
        <SVTODATE TYPE="Date">20251019</SVTODATE>
        <SVCURRENTCOMPANY>M/S. SAHOO SANITARY (2025-26)</SVCURRENTCOMPANY>
      </STATICVARIABLES>
      <TDL>
        <TDLMESSAGE>
          <COLLECTION NAME="PurchaseVocs">
            <TYPE>Voucher</TYPE>
            <FILTERS>OnlyPurchase</FILTERS>
          </COLLECTION>
          <SYSTEM TYPE="Formulae" NAME="OnlyPurchase">
            $VoucherType = "Purchase"
          </SYSTEM>
        </TDLMESSAGE>
      </TDL>
    </DESC>
  </BODY>
</ENVELOPE>

request.description: Get total purchase amount for a date range - useful for dashboard summary

body.raw:
<ENVELOPE>
  <HEADER>
    <VERSION>1</VERSION>
    <TALLYREQUEST>Export</TALLYREQUEST>
    <TYPE>Collection</TYPE>
    <ID>SupplierSummary</ID>
  </HEADER>
  <BODY>
    <DESC>
      <STATICVARIABLES>
        <SVCURRENTCOMPANY>M/S. SAHOO SANITARY (2025-26)</SVCURRENTCOMPANY>
        <SVFROMDATE TYPE="Date">20250401</SVFROMDATE>
        <SVTODATE TYPE="Date">20251019</SVTODATE>
      </STATICVARIABLES>
      <TDL>
        <TDLMESSAGE>
          <COLLECTION NAME="SupplierPurchases">
            <TYPE>Voucher</TYPE>
            <FETCH>PARTYLEDGERNAME, AMOUNT</FETCH>
            <FILTER>PurchaseFilter</FILTER>
          </COLLECTION>
          <SYSTEM TYPE="Formulae" NAME="PurchaseFilter">$$IsPurchase:$VOUCHERTYPENAME</SYSTEM>
        </TDLMESSAGE>
      </TDL>
    </DESC>
  </BODY>
</ENVELOPE>

request.description: Get purchase summary grouped by supplier/party name with total amounts

item.name: Get Purchase Vouchers with GST Details

body.raw:
<ENVELOPE>
  <HEADER>
    <VERSION>1</VERSION>
    <TALLYREQUEST>EXPORT</TALLYREQUEST>
    <TYPE>COLLECTION</TYPE>
    <ID>Purchase Vouchers with GST</ID>
  </HEADER>
  <BODY>
    <DESC>
      <STATICVARIABLES>
        <SVCURRENTCOMPANY>M/S. SAHOO SANITARY (2025-26)</SVCURRENTCOMPANY>
        <SVFROMDATE TYPE="DATE">20250401</SVFROMDATE>
        <SVTODATE TYPE="DATE">20251019</SVTODATE>
        <SVEXPORTFORMAT>$$SysName:XML</SVEXPORTFORMAT>
      </STATICVARIABLES>
      <TDL>
        <TDLMESSAGE>
          <COLLECTION NAME="Purchase Vouchers with GST">
            <TYPE>Voucher</TYPE>
            <FETCH>DATE, VOUCHERNUMBER, PARTYLEDGERNAME, AMOUNT, GUID</FETCH>
            <FETCH>ALLLEDGERENTRIES.LIST : LEDGERNAME, AMOUNT, GSTRATE</FETCH>
            <FILTER>PurchaseVouchersOnly</FILTER>
          </COLLECTION>
          <SYSTEM TYPE="Formulae" NAME="PurchaseVouchersOnly">$$IsPurchase:$VOUCHERTYPE</SYSTEM>
        </TDLMESSAGE>
      </TDL>
    </DESC>
  </BODY>
</ENVELOPE>

request.description: Fetch Purchase vouchers with GST/tax details including CGST, SGST, IGST breakdown
